summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
Blackberry Events is an award-winning, Birmingham-based event management agency that specializes in designing, developing, and delivering purpose-driven corporate and public events—including conferences, award ceremonies, roadshows, and community events—across the UK. With over 15 years of experience, the company offers full-service event management as well as expert support services such as AV, logistics, and delegate management, always centered around people, passion, and purpose.
